Note: Noon: Clock set back 7 min. 1210 cc SSW3/4w
Day not missing. Crossed the dateline.
0520: Stopped. Round Id bore ESE1/2E, Timboor Id SE3/4E. 0557 Got underway cc S.
0800: Stood in for Emmosis Bay, Yasawa Id.
0905: Anchored. Emmosis Bay (?) yasawa Id. Leon Id bore NWxN, East ed of Asawa Id bore NxE1/4E, East end of Yasawa bore SW1/2S
Noon: E end of Asawa Id bore NExE3/4E, W end of Asawa bore ENE3/4E, Timboor Id ESE, E of Yasawa bore SxE3/4E Noon: Anchored at Yasawa.
1800: Wd end of Kandavu bore SExE3/4E, Western side of entrance Tabuca (?) hbr E1/4N
mid-0400: Laying off Island of Kandavu.
0915: Sd+Wd to pass the Sd side of the island for Agolon Bay (?)
0920: Got Underway. Stood out under pilot.
1220: Took departure Kanduva Peak bore W3/8S, Cape Bligh N1/2W, course NNE Noon: Enroute Levuka, Fiji
0500: sighted small islands north of Kandavu brg SWxW, 0520 cc SSW
Noon: SWxW1/4W, 1210 took departure Mt Washington brg SExE 12mi Noon: Enroute Brisbane. (AU)
1350: Set Aneroid Barometer with Mercurial raising former .25 of an inch.

Clouds: ci cu. ci st. cu st.

Note: 2000: Centre of Walpole Id bore ExS abt 4mi
0615: Island of Pines WxN, 0800 IoP bore NWxW1/4W
Noon: Island of Pines bore abeam. 1245 cc WSW
0400: After stopping for sounding had to renew valve of the air pump of after engine, and went on course at 0400.
Big drop in baro readings here.

Other: 0350: Observed a bright lunar rainbow to Ed

Note: 2200: Sighted Cape Morton (Moreton) Lt brg SSW
1245: Got Underway. Standing up Moreton Bay Noon: Standing into Moreton bay. Pilot in charge.
2000: Changed from Mercurial to Aneroid Barometer.
0530: Got Underway. Stood down the bay
0900: Anchored. Yule Roads. Moreton Bay. Cowan Pt brg SxE1/4E, Boat House of Pilot station ENE1/4E
1200: Morton Bay Lt brg W7/8S, Mt Tempest light SW3/8S, Glass house West Noon: Enroute Sydney, Australia..
2000: South Hd Lt bore SW3/4S and Broken Bay brg W3/4N
2200: Lost sight of Sydney Hd Lt brg SW1/4W: Stood for light
0755: Anchored. Sydney hbr. Brgs at anchor Ships hd SxE1/2E, Garden Id South elevation, SE1/2E, Macquarie (?) Fort SWxW1/2W
0600: Got Underway. To dry dock, Cockatoo Id
0730: Stopped. Made fast to buoy at entrance of dry dock.
0800: Got Underway. Hauled into dry dock
0530: Hauled out of dry dock back to Sydney Hbr.
1030: Got Underway. Stood down the bay
Noon: Sydney Hbr, Australia and enroute Semoan Ids
0600: Sighted the !Three Kings! highest island brg SExE1/2E
Put date back one day because crossing the dateline.
2000: ExN, 2355 brought ship by the wind
0750: NNW 0750: NW end Savage Id bore NE
1605: Brought by the wind port tack brg NxE
1715: NW1/2W, took departure West Cape brg NE 1/2mi
1600: Sent 1st & 3rd cutter and whale boat in charge of Luit Allibom to render assistance to a German Bark which seemed to be sitting on the surf.
0800: German Barkue Batavia came in and anchored.
1200: The German Barque came in again and anchored.  ???? Noon: Apia, Upolo ID.
0800: Took departure to NE1/2N, Apia church SSW1/2W 5mi,
0820: ENE1/4E, 0835 stopped for cast, 1857 underway on ENE1/2E course.
1000: NW, 1015 Stopped and Sounding. 1057 Sent boat ashore, (returned at 1200)
0030: Ship standing ExS on port tack.
0723: Sighted Washington Id {Ua Huka} brg NxE1/2E
0824: off Washington Id on various courses until 1057 when ship was brought by the wind.
Noon: NW end of Oahu Id NNW, East end NE3/4E
1552: Anchored. Moored to Kedge on the reef.
1200: Took departure East end Cahu brg S3/4E, west end brg N1/2s. Ships heading NxW3/4W.  Noon: Honolulu HI

Other: 1310: Onserved floating kelp and drift wood; Water changed to freenish color.

Note: 0912: Heading for entrance to San Francisco
Noon: Standing into San Francisco Bay under pilot.
1540: Anchored. In bay. Brgs: NE end Yorba Buena Id NE1/2N; Alcatraz Lt NWxN1/2N.
1935: Got Underway. Standing up Pablo Bay for Mare Island
2245: Anchored. Made fast to Navy Yard Buoy.
The TT and TW from 1300-2000 have big jumps up and down which seem unlikely. Howver, the day previous and subsequent both do get into the upper 60s.

People: 0915: Transferred Major Welling (Qr Gr ?) to US Naval Asylum.

Note: I lowered the baros from here to 1000 by 0.20 inches. It looks like log writer mistook a 7 for a 9.
Noon: No data after 1200hrs. Noon: Mare Island, Cal
0900: Hauled down Ensign and Pennant and went out of commission.
